description: Style Note Show your pride and team spirit by sporting the famous and ever-bright Kochi Tuskers Kerala jersey from lotto. Feel that Kochi blood pumping through you as you cheer your team on. There's no better way of saying "Go Tuskers!" than with this jersey.Product Details Orange and purple jersey, has a round neck, short sleeves, and Kochi Tuskers logo on left chestMaterial and Care 100% PolyesterMachine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry, dry clean or iron on print/trims/ logoDry in shadeWarm iron Size and Fit Regular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo ) is wearing a size M
